title: Canada Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q1 2025
content: In the first quarter of 2025, vehicle sales recorded a YoY rise of 2.88%. On the contrary, vehicle sales fell by 3.76% on a quarter-on-quarter (QoQ) basis. ZEV penetration decreased to Â 8.72%, marking the lowest level in the past five quarters. Additionally, Q1 2025 saw a 23.12% YoY dip in ZEV adoption. Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs), which account for 70.92% of total ZEV sales, recorded a 26.22% YoY decrease in Q1 2025. Plug-in Hybrid Vehicle (PHEV) sales also fell YoY, reaching 10,828 units, a 14.36% YoY fall.
author: Aru Somya
